resort_info.name: Selam Stay Luxury Resort
resort_info.location: Bishoftu (Debre Zeyit), Ethiopia — 47km from Addis Ababa
resort_info.description: A premium lakeside resort blending modern luxury with deep Ethiopian traditions on the shores of Lake Bishoftu.

amenities.name: Fitness Center
amenities.note: Yoga mats and personal trainer available 7–9 AM

restaurants.name: Tibeb Restaurant
restaurants.reservation: Recommended for dinner. Ask front desk or Selam to book.

breakfast_buffet.note: Includes injera bar, honey, eggs, and fresh juice

signature_dishes.name: Selam Kitfo
signature_dishes.description: Prime minced beef with spiced butter and ayib, served with kocho.

signature_dishes.name: Doro Wot Feast
signature_dishes.description: Traditional spicy chicken stew with boiled eggs, served on injera.

signature_dishes.name: Shiro Tagamino
signature_dishes.description: Silky shiro cooked directly in a clay pot with berbere and niter kibbeh.

signature_dishes.name: Tibs Selam
signature_dishes.description: Sautéed beef cubes with rosemary, green pepper, and onion.

signature_dishes.name: Asa (Fish Wot)
signature_dishes.description: Freshwater fish from Lake Bishoftu in a light tomato berbere sauce.

signature_dishes.name: Veggie Beyaynet
signature_dishes.description: A colorful platter of 7 different vegetarian dishes on injera.

restaurants.name: Lakeside Bar & Grill
restaurants.note: Best spot for sunset drinks. Live music Fridays & Saturdays 8 PM.

signature_dishes.name: Nile Perch Burger
signature_dishes.description: Fresh lake fish with spicy mayo, avocado, and injera bun.

signature_dishes.name: Beef Tibs Platter
signature_dishes.description: Sizzling beef cubes with rosemary and chili, served with fries.

signature_dishes.name: Ethiopian Wings
signature_dishes.description: Berbere-marinated chicken wings with yogurt dip.

signature_dishes.name: Lakeside Cocktail
signature_dishes.description: House special with tej (honey wine), ginger, and citrus.

room_service.note: All Tibeb menu items available. 30-min delivery guarantee or 10% off.
room_service.order_method: Tell Selam what you want and she will place the order.

coffee_ceremony.name: Traditional Ethiopian Coffee Ceremony
coffee_ceremony.description: An authentic 3-round coffee ceremony with incense and popcorn, hosted by our cultural team.
coffee_ceremony.member_perk: Complimentary for Gold and Platinum loyalty members

spa_wellness.name: Abyssinian Wellness Spa
spa_wellness.booking_note: Book at least 2 hours in advance. Selam can book for you.

services.name: Ethiopian Aromatherapy
services.description: Deep relaxation using frankincense, myrrh, and Ethiopian botanical oils.

services.name: Deep Tissue Massage
services.description: Targets muscle tension and improves circulation. Ideal for active guests.

services.name: Lakeside Couples Massage
services.description: Side-by-side massage for two with lake view.

services.name: Ethiopian Mud Wrap
services.description: Volcanic mud from the Rift Valley detox treatment.

services.name: Facial — Honey & Turmeric
services.description: Natural brightening facial using local honey and turmeric.

services.name: Lakeside Yoga
services.description: Sunrise (6:30 AM) and sunset (6:00 PM) sessions on the lakeside deck.

on_site.name: Cultural Dance Show
on_site.note: Free for all guests, at Lakeside Bar

on_site.name: Sunrise Yoga
on_site.booking: Book with Selam 1 day in advance

excursions.name: Mount Zuqualla Hike
excursions.description: Extinct volcano with a crater lake and 12th-century monastery at the summit. Spectacular views.

excursions.name: Lake Babogaya Birdwatching
excursions.description: Flamingos, pelicans, and over 100 species. Guided boat tour available.

excursions.name: Addis Ababa City Tour
excursions.description: Includes National Museum (Lucy), Mercato, and Entoto Hill. Private driver.

excursions.name: Debre Zeyit Market Visit
excursions.description: Explore the vibrant local market. Best on Saturdays.

local_attractions.name: Mount Zuqualla
local_attractions.desc: Extinct volcano with a monastery crown. Magnificent sunset views.

local_attractions.name: Lake Babogaya
local_attractions.desc: Famous for flamingos and serene kayaking.

local_attractions.name: Debre Zeyit Market
local_attractions.desc: Vibrant local Saturday market. Great for spices and crafts.

local_attractions.name: Hora Recreational Park
local_attractions.desc: Lakeside park popular with locals. Great for evening strolls.

proactive_schedule.morning_6_to_9: Suggest sunrise yoga, bird watching, or the breakfast buffet at Tibeb.
proactive_schedule.morning_9_to_12: Suggest spa booking, excursion planning, or the cooking class.
proactive_schedule.afternoon_12_to_17: Suggest kayaking, pool, or an Addis Ababa city tour.
proactive_schedule.afternoon_17_to_19: Remind about the Coffee Ceremony at 5 PM and the Cultural Dance Show.
proactive_schedule.evening_19_to_24: Suggest the Lakeside Bar sunset cocktails, live music (Fri/Sat), and in-room dining.
